name: Zucchini Chick Pea Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta until al dente (preferably thin egg noodles or whole wheat spaghetti).
2. For garnish, slice scallions very thin and drop into ice water; curls will form in about 15 minutes.
3. In a large pot, bring water to a boil and cook the pasta as directed on the package.
4. While the pasta cooks, heat safflower oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
5. Add onion and garlic; sauté until softened.
6. Add mushrooms and zucchini; sauté until the zucchini is tender but not mushy.
7. Stir in the remaining ingredients (chick peas, tomato paste, curry powder, water, black pepper); cook, covered, for about 8 minutes.
8. When the pasta is done, drain well.
9. Spoon vegetables over the cooked pasta and garnish with scallion curls.
Variations:
- Add 1-2 teaspoons of finely minced gingerroot; sauté with the vegetables.
- Serve on beds of hot cooked brown rice or couscous.
Note: This dish fits into a vegan diet, as it contains no animal products. The chick peas and pasta together provide complete protein.
